description: Add comprehensive unit tests for all firewall and network security components. Follow the existing doctest pattern from tests/edr/ and tests/scanner/. Add tests in tests/firewall/ and tests/network/ directories.
steps: Step 1 - Create tests/firewall/test_rule_engine.cpp: Test RuleEngine with cases for: add/remove rules, priority ordering (higher priority rules match first), CIDR IP matching (192.168.1.0/24 matches 192.168.1.5), port range matching, protocol matching, application path matching, enable/disable rules, default action when no rule matches, evaluatePacket returns correct action.

Step 2 - Create tests/firewall/test_connection_tracker.cpp: Test ConnectionTracker with cases for: parsing /proc/net/tcp format strings (hex IP/port to readable format), connection state mapping (hex state codes to TCP states), handling malformed input, getConnections returns parsed results.

Step 3 - Create tests/firewall/test_packet_filter.cpp: Test PacketFilter with cases for: filtering packets against rules, allowing packets that match allow rules, denying packets that match deny rules, logging packets that match log rules, statistics tracking (allowed/denied counts).

Step 4 - Create tests/network/test_ip_blocklist.cpp: Test IPBlocklist with cases for: add/remove individual IPs, CIDR range blocking (10.0.0.0/8 blocks 10.1.2.3), isBlocked returns true for blocked IPs and false for non-blocked, bulk import, clear resets the list, edge cases (0.0.0.0, 255.255.255.255).

Step 5 - Create tests/network/test_dns_filter.cpp: Test DNSFilter with cases for: blocklist blocks exact domains, allowlist overrides blocklist, wildcard matching (*.evil.com matches sub.evil.com but not evil.com), category-based blocking, empty domain handling.

Step 6 - Create tests/network/test_intrusion_detector.cpp: Test IntrusionDetector with cases for: port scan detection (many ports from same source in short window), SYN flood detection (many connections to same dest), brute force detection (many failed attempts to same port), rule-based content matching, normal traffic does not trigger alerts.

Step 7 - Create tests/network/test_bandwidth_monitor.cpp: Test BandwidthMonitor: recording traffic updates stats, per-app stats accumulate correctly, rate limiting denies over-limit traffic, total stats aggregate all connections.

Step 8 - Create tests/network/test_network_isolation.cpp: Test NetworkIsolation: enable/disable isolation, management IPs are allowed when isolated, non-management IPs are blocked when isolated, all IPs allowed when not isolated.
Step 9 - Create tests/network/test_application_control.cpp: Test ApplicationControl: allow/deny specific apps, default policy applies to unknown apps, remove policy resets to default.
Step 10 - Create tests/network/test_geo_blocking.cpp: Test GeoBlocker: add country block, IP in blocked country is blocked, IP not in blocked country is allowed, remove country unblocks.

Step 11 - Update tests/CMakeLists.txt: Add all new test files to TEST_SOURCES. Add target_include_directories for src/firewall/include and src/network/include. Add target_link_libraries for threatone_firewall and threatone_network.
acceptance_criteria: tests/network/ contains test_ip_blocklist.cpp, test_dns_filter.cpp, test_intrusion_detector.cpp, test_bandwidth_monitor.cpp, test_network_isolation.cpp, test_application_control.cpp, test_geo_blocking.cpp
Tests exercise real logic paths - not just calling methods with mocks
Each test file has multiple TEST_CASE blocks covering normal and edge cases
